pages.title: Abstract
pages.html:
Séminaire de Géométrie Algébrique du Bois Marie
1962
Local cohomology of coherent sheaves and local and global Lefschetz theorems
(SGA 2)

Abstract. This volume is a re-typeset and annotated edition of the book "Cohomologie locale des faisceaux cohérents et théorèmes de Lefschetz locaux et globaux (SGA 2)", Advanced Studies in Pure Mathematics 2, North-Holland Publishing Company - Amsterdam, 1968, by A. Grothendieck et al.

In this work, one gives necessary and sufficient conditions for the finiteness of the local cohomology sheaves of a coherent sheaf. These results lead to algebraization theorems which allow, in particular, by means of purity theorems also proved in the text, to obtain Lefschetz-type theorems for the fundamental group or the Picard group.
